entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cajanus cajan) studied for nitrogen remobilization and leaf abscission patterns across different maturity groups.

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A key nutrient remobilized from senescing leaves to seeds during the reproductive stage of the plant.

entities.name: NITROGEN REMOBILIZATION
entities.description: The physiological process of redistributing nitrogen from leaves to seeds during the seed filling stage.

entities.name: SEED FILLING STAGE
entities.description: The reproductive phase of the plant when seeds are developing and nutrients are redistributed from vegetative organs.

entities.name: LEAF ABSCISSION
entities.description: The natural shedding of leaves, the pattern of which is related to the efficiency of nitrogen remobilization.

entities.name: MATURITY DURATION
entities.description: The length of time a genotype takes to reach maturity, categorized into extra-short, short, and medium groups.

entities.name: EXTRA-SHORT MATURITY
entities.description: A maturity group (ESD) characterized by slower leaf abscission and lower nitrogen remobilization efficiency.

entities.name: SHORT MATURITY
entities.description: A maturity group (SD) that remobilizes leaf nitrogen more efficiently than extra-short and medium maturity groups.

entities.name: MEDIUM MATURITY
entities.description: A maturity group (MD) used as a comparison for nitrogen remobilization and leaf abscission patterns.

entities.name: PLANT BUDGET FOR N
entities.description: An above-ground plant budget approach used to determine the net remobilization of nitrogen from leaves.

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to calculate the rate of nitrogen loss in terms of half-life from leaf layers.

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of seed growth that depends on the remobilization of nitrogen from senescing leaves.
